calendar.matters:
Petition Of Roger Levin, Atty In Fact Of Tatiana
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Tatiana Papkov-Hacker is in court. Court wants to make sure that Ms. Papkov-Hacker can have more court protection. Ms. Papkov-Hacker does not want to have a bond or any accounting. She trusts the petitioner. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition Of Roger Levin, Atty In Fact Of Tatiana
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Continued To Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Court thanks counsel for providing the information. Ms. Papkov-Hacker is not in court. Court is not comfortable with approving the petition without the beneficiary present. Matter is continued to 7/10. Counsel will have her come in. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
